mapper.insert: INSERT INTO oauth_pending_social_sessions ( pending_token_hash, oauth_provider, provider_user_id, provider_email, provider_display_name, suggested_email, expires_at ) VALUES ( #{pendingTokenHash}, #{oauthProvider}, #{providerUserId}, #{providerEmail}, #{providerDisplayName}, #{suggestedEmail}, #{expiresAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT pending_social_session_id, pending_token_hash, oauth_provider, provider_user_id, provider_email, provider_display_name, suggested_email, expires_at, consumed_at, created_at, updated_at FROM oauth_pending_social_sessions WHERE pending_token_hash = #{pendingTokenHash}

SELECT pending_social_session_id, pending_token_hash, oauth_provider, provider_user_id, provider_email, provider_display_name, suggested_email, expires_at, consumed_at, created_at, updated_at FROM oauth_pending_social_sessions WHERE pending_token_hash = #{pendingTokenHash} AND consumed_at IS NULL AND expires_at > #{now}
mapper.update: UPDATE oauth_pending_social_sessions SET consumed_at = COALESCE(consumed_at, #{consumedAt}), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6) WHERE pending_token_hash = #{pendingTokenHash} AND consumed_at IS NULL
